events.label: reasoning
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "staged",
  "component_conditions": ["non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 0,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "No wire-pulling lubricant staged for a long pull, risking insulation damage and increased pulling tension beyond conductor limits."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work until proper lubricant is on hand and applied per manufacturer instructions and NEC 310.10(C) considerations."
  ],
  "rationale": "Pulling conductors without lubricant on a long run can exceed maximum pulling tension, damage insulation, and create latent defects. NEC 310.10(C) requires installation methods that prevent damage; lubricant is an industry-standard means to comply. The absence of lubricant at the staged condition is a non-compliant preparation that must be corrected before work begins.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 310.10(C)",
    "NEC 110.12 (Mechanical Execution of Work)",
    "Manufacturer submittal for pulling lubricant"
  ]
}
